name: VeloBridgeJob
description: A job packet staged for local pickup by a bridge runner

owner_user_id.description: ID of the user who owns the job

owner_email.description: Email of the user who owns the job

device_id.description: ID of the target bridge device

request_id.description: ID of the associated real-world action request

title.description: A short title describing the job

status.description: Current status of the job packet

packet_id.description: Unique identifier for this job packet

packet_nonce.description: A random nonce for the packet to prevent replay attacks

packet_issued_at.description: ISO timestamp when the packet was created

packet_expires_at.description: ISO timestamp when the packet expires

packet_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical job packet data

runner_signature.description: Cryptographic signature from the local runner on the result

packet_summary.description: A safe, high-level summary of the packet contents

approval_prompt.description: The specific message shown to the user for local approval

execution_adapter.description: The local adapter that will handle the execution (e.g. browser_v1, trade_v1)

execution_mode.description: How the local runner should execute this job

local_confirmation_required.description: Whether local manual confirmation is required on the device

result_summary.description: A summary of the execution result

last_pulled_at.description: ISO timestamp of when the job was last pulled
